summary: Maeda has turned bullish in his most recent video, explicitly declaring 'The Bottom Is In' and identifying catalysts that could propel Bitcoin higher.
narrative: He argues that the market is currently bottoming contrary to standard 4-Year Cycle theories, and points to STRC as a new form of leverage that could drive Bitcoin prices up. This marks a definitive shift from his previously successful bearish stance on Ethereum recorded in late 2025.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
